headline: 3 Services Stocks for Long-Term Investors
summary: Business services providers play a critical role for enterprises, assisting them with everything from new hardware integrations to consulting and marketing. Furthermore, the demand for their offerings is rising as more clients outsource non-core functions, a trend that has enabled the industry to return 8.6% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
